---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a capability, connector improvement, or operator workflow enhancement
title: "[feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Problem Statement

What operator, contributor, or ecosystem problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the behavior or outcome you want Viaduct to support.

## Alternatives Considered

What alternatives, workarounds, or adjacent approaches have you considered?

## Impact

Who benefits from this change, and how would it improve evaluation, operations, or extensibility?

## Additional Context

Include architecture, compatibility, or release considerations if they matter.
